remember: Identify the basic syntax of Python programming language
Remember the data types supported by Python
Recall the basic operators used in Python
understand: Understand the concept of variables and their declaration in Python
Explain the difference between single and double quotes in Python
Understand the concept of comments in Python
apply: Write a simple Python program using basic syntax
Use variables to store and manipulate data in Python
Apply basic operators to perform arithmetic operations
analyze: Analyze the output of a Python program and identify errors
Compare the efficiency of different data types in Python
Analyze the use of comments in a Python program

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: Students will be able to write simple Python programs using basic syntax.
As per NCERT objective 2: Students will be able to declare and use variables in Python.
As per NCERT objective 3: Students will be able to apply basic operators in Python.
board_exam_objectives: Identify the basic syntax of Python programming language as per CBSE guidelines
Use variables and basic operators as per CBSE guidelines
Apply basic concepts of Python programming as per CBSE guidelines
